spec.description: Summary dashboard for Docker containers per host. Shows container identity, status, CPU, memory, network, filesystem metrics from cAdvisor, plus container and journald logs.
Time since container last started
spec.title: Container Uptime

spec.description: Network receive and transmit throughput in bytes/sec
spec.title: Network Throughput (RX / TX)

spec.description: Network packets received and transmitted per second, with dropped packet counts
spec.title: Network Packets & Drops

spec.description: Filesystem read and write throughput in bytes/sec
spec.title: Filesystem I/O Throughput (Read / Write)

spec.description: Filesystem read and write operations per second
spec.title: Filesystem IOPS (Read / Write)

spec.description: Current working set memory consumption of the container
spec.title: Memory Used

spec.description: Configured memory limit for the container
spec.title: Memory Limit

spec.description: Memory usage % of configured limit
spec.title: Memory Usage %

spec.description: Container memory: working set, RSS, cache, and total usage
spec.title: Memory Usage

spec.description: Log volume over time per log level from the container's stdout/stderr
spec.title: Container Logs Volume by Level

spec.description: Distribution of log levels from the container's stdout/stderr over the selected time range
spec.title: Container Logs — Level Distribution

spec.description: Journald log volume over time per log level for the selected container
spec.title: Journald Logs Volume by Level

spec.description: Distribution of journald log levels for the selected container over the selected time range
spec.title: Journald Logs — Level Distribution

spec.description: Container stdout/stderr logs from Loki (Docker logging driver)
spec.title: Container Logs

spec.description: Docker container logs captured via systemd journal (journald transport)
spec.title: Journald Logs (Docker Container)

spec.description: CPU usage as percentage of total CPU time
spec.title: CPU Usage

spec.description: Current number of CPU cores consumed by the container (rate of CPU seconds = cores)
spec.title: CPU Cores Used

spec.description: Configured CPU quota for the container (in cores, -1 = No Limit)
spec.title: CPU Limit

spec.description: CPU usage as percentage of the configured CPU quota limit
spec.title: CPU Usage %

spec.description: Shows when each Docker container was running (green) or stopped/absent (no data). Detects container presence via container_start_time_seconds — useful for spotting stop/start cycles and unexpected downtime.
spec.title: Container Up/Down State
Docker Containers / by Node
